name: wire-version-field-reject
description: An export entry carrying a `version` field. `version` is the operator's deployment pin in `App.gadgets`, never the agent's to author — it is resolved from the registry at push time, never carried on the wire. `gadgetExportUseSchema` is `.strict()`, so a `version` field MUST be rejected at parse time rather than silently dropped.
rejectReason: `version` is registry-side (App.gadgets), not a wire field; gadgetExportUseSchema is .strict().
